subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! As thou surveyest the happenings, tidings and chronicles of ages, centuries and epochs in this world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مطمئنه چون در جهان حوادث و اخبار و تاریخ قرون و دهور و اعصار نگری اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @free will and predestination; fate, @prayer for women
